title: ViCeR
description: adds a VHS style overlay when playing while also locked in first person to sell that idea.
body:
# ViCeR will only work with multiplayer on 2.2.0+!!!

# What is ViCeR?

ViCeR adds a VHS style overlay when playing but also locks the player into first-person while in survival.

It also adds a command to customise ViCeR:

/vcrc <locked|tapedate|realtime|vcr> <suboption>
  - locked's suboption is a boolean to toggle the locking in first person feature.
  - tapedate's suboption is any 6 long digit to display
  - realtime's suboption is a boolean to toggle between a preset time ticking and realtime sync with the world.
  - vcr's suboption is a boolean to toggle off and on the VHS overlay

It's meant to turn minecraft into looking like a VHS recording.

This was made for a private FNaF modpack between me and my friend.

Currently only has American & British English and Slovak translations.

![black background with white glitchy text saying "END OF TAPE", "REPLAY" and "EJECT TAPE"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZOsbSn1o/images/47cb070f499036cd9f9fe95e1859f208aa44eaac.png)
